summary: Phil peaks on Unbroken Chain; recording source and quality not mentioned.
review: The lone review gushes over Phil Lesh’s vocal performance on “Unbroken Chain,” calling it a highlight of the night, and notes Jerry Garcia’s patient, sweet‑note guitar work. No information is provided about the tape source or sound clarity, so the recording quality remains unknown.

ai_rating.rationale: A single 5‑star review praises the musical performance strongly while offering no insight into recording quality; thus the rating leans heavily on the show’s perceived excellence but confidence is low due to limited data.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Review does not mention soundboard, audience, or any audio characteristics; recording quality cannot be assessed beyond being unremarked.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewer focuses on Phil’s vocals and Jerry’s relaxed soloing; no broader comments on set pacing or transitions.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Takes his time down to the last sweet note, praised by reviewer.
band_member_comments.Phil: Sings the hell out of “Unbroken Chain,” highlighted as a peak performance.
